global_rules: Start from freshly fetched origin/dev on task/<task-id>; never implement from the dirty shared workspace.
Open the archived Claude Design source and Review 003 together. Review conditions override conflicting prototype behavior.
Use generated OpenAPI client/types and approved backend states; no direct fixture, silent fallback, invented payload, state, permission, or error code.
Every mutation uses If-Match/idempotency where specified, is non-optimistic for high-risk actions, preserves user input on conflict, and displays a durable receipt.
Each task owns only its listed files, produces focused tests and exact-commit evidence, opens a PR to dev, and is independently reviewed.
No task may claim accessibility or responsive completion without Playwright plus axe evidence at 390, 1024, and 1440 px.
The umbrella ODP-INTAKE-UX-001 remains todo until all eight tasks are independently approved and integrated.

tasks.title: Build assisted intake UI foundation, routes, generated-client boundary, and URL state
acceptance: Mount the actual Assisted Intake experience at /w/expansion/listings and durable /intake/:intakeId routes using generated API types/client only.
Create typed component boundaries for the seven feature slices without implementing alternate domain states.
Serialize filters, sort, list/map view, selection, active section, compare task, and receipt state into deterministic restorable URL parameters, satisfying VDC-004.
Implement route-level loading/error/permission boundaries, tenant scope, feature flag, and no-silent-fixture-fallback behavior.

tasks.title: Implement Listing Inbox intake integration and URL submission
acceptance: Implement server-paginated Listing Inbox columns, filters, stable sort, saved views, list/map preservation, direct review actions, and URL restoration.
Implement syntax validation, source detection, original/canonical URL display, HeatZone/ownership context, double-submit lock, exact duplicate short path, and durable intake receipt.
Render source policy as user-submitted single-page retrieval or approved push feed; never imply scheduled crawling or request provider credentials.
Prove direct open, submission, reload, back, forward, idempotent lost-response replay, empty/loading/degraded/error/read-only/no-results states.

tasks.title: Implement durable processing detail, timeline, evidence, errors, and receipts
acceptance: Render exact intake stages and history without fabricated percentages, including retryability, freshness, assignment/SLA, checkpoints, attempts, next retry, cancellation, DLQ, and replay authority.
Expose source/canonical URL, snapshot/parser/correlation evidence, match recommendation versus human decision, version/ETag, audit timeline, and durable receipts.
Implement every declared error/conflict with exact code, correlation ID, time, current state/version, retryability, preserved input, and next action.
Apply masking/purpose binding without revealing hidden values and keep credential-class data absent.

tasks.title: Implement assisted entry, field lineage, correction, and retry-safe drafts
acceptance: Render Identity, Location, Commercial, Property, and Provenance groups with parsed, normalized, corrected, effective, confidence, missing, and masked states.
Require reason and risk acknowledgement for identity, address, rent, area, and match-affecting corrections according to backend policy.
Implement ASSISTED_ENTRY_ONLY without retrieval or credential prompts and preserve original URL/evidence.
Persist user drafts across retryable errors, version conflicts, navigation, reload, and correction resubmission.

tasks.title: Implement duplicate, revision, possible-match, and reversible identity review UI
acceptance: Keep NEW, EXACT_DUPLICATE, REVISION, POSSIBLE_MATCH, and QUARANTINED visibly and behaviorally distinct with canonical codes.
Render source ID, canonical URL, address, area, floor, listing type, rent/price, status, confidence, contradictions, and screen-reader change summary.
Never auto-merge POSSIBLE_MATCH; require explicit create/revise/duplicate/steward actions and second-actor review where specified.
Show merge/split/unmerge/reversal graph plan, lineage impact, before/after, reason, risk, proposer/reviewer, self-review denial, conflict, and receipt.

tasks.title: Implement assignment, SLA, transfer, pause, escalation, and conflict UI
acceptance: Implement all assignment and SLA states, owner/queue/due-time/history, claim, transfer, pause/resume, overdue, breach, and escalation behavior.
Satisfy VDC-001: Transfer contains target and handoff note only; Pause contains reason and required editable resume time only.
On OWNER_CONFLICT preserve all input, display current owner/version, refresh, resubmit with If-Match, and emit versioned audit timeline plus durable receipt.
Use text plus icon/pattern for SLA, with no optimistic mutation or hidden default resume time.

tasks.title: Implement reviewed Candidate Site promotion and SiteScore job UI
acceptance: Render every approved promotion, decision, and job state without compressing the saga into one loading state.
Require explicit request, independent second-actor approval, reason, risk acknowledgement, If-Match, idempotency, and non-optimistic execution.
Display Candidate and SiteScore IDs only after authoritative commit; SCORE_FAILED retains the Candidate and offers authorized replay with the same idempotency key.
Recover lost responses without duplicate Candidate creation and expose durable promotion/job receipts plus audit evidence.

tasks.title: Close responsive, accessibility, role, recovery, and end-to-end UI gates
acceptance: Exercise the six canonical flows against the real API client with no route stubs or silent fixtures, including exact duplicate, assisted entry, possible match, promotion, score failure, and replay.
Satisfy VDC-002 and VDC-003: zero page-level overflow at 390/1024/1440, stable focus return, keyboard completion, screen-reader summaries, landmarks, reduced motion, and zero serious axe violations.
Verify every role, masking, self-review denial, source-policy denial, read-only mode, conflict, stale snapshot, quarantine, DLQ, and durable receipt state.
Record exact commit, browser/version, viewport screenshots, axe output, commands, failures, and independent reviewer disposition.
